div.class: s_floating_blocks_alert_empty d-none alert alert-info mx-auto text-center

t.div:
Add new cards using the sidebar
TIP: You need at least two cards to perform the effect

section.class: s_floating_blocks_block s_col_no_resize position-sticky d-flex overflow-hidden py-5 o_cc o_cc1

div.class: s_floating_blocks_block_grid row o_grid_mode gx-0 gy-2 flex-grow-1 w-100 h-lg-100 overflow-hidden align-self-start align-self-lg-auto
